subcodes.first_line: O Rasul! Hearken in all times unto My call: "Verily there is no God but Him, and He Who hath appeared is indeed His Glory..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رسول اسمع ندائی فی کل حین بانه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لبهائه فی
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
